title: SoFi: A Decade of Disrupting Finance and Profitability Milestone
text: SoFi Technologies achieved historic profitability milestones on its path to becoming a top financial institution. The company's national bank charter, secured in 2022 through the acquisition of Golden Pacific Bancorp, has enabled SoFi to fund loans with its own deposit base and capture higher net interest margins. In Q4 2023, SoFi achieved GAAP net income profitability, the first quarter in company history with positive earnings under GAAP. By 2024, the company achieved its first full year of profitability, reporting net income of $100 million with adjusted net revenue increasing 26% to $2.61 billion and member count surpassing 10 million. In Q4 2025, SoFi reported its ninth consecutive quarter of GAAP profitability, with quarterly revenue surpassing $1 billion for the first time in company history. The company is guiding to $1.6 billion in adjusted EBITDA for 2026. These milestones represent a transformation from a growth-focused fintech to a profitable digital bank with sustainable earnings power.
